eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Georgia; at 07:47 PM ON APR 12, 2026 Effective until 01:47 AM APR 13, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: We interrupt this program to bring you this important announcement. This is an emergency missing child alert, or Levis Call, the Georgia version of an Amber Alert. The Thomasville Police Department and the GEORGIA BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION are looking for a 2021 white Nissan Rogue Georgia tax DBM4416. On April 12, 2026, Keilana Butler,  2 year old black female with black hair and brown eyes and was last seen wearing an orange and pink tank top with black shorts and baby shark slides. She was abducted by Lavinciano Rasanad Butler, a 34 year old black male, 5 10, weighing 150 lbs. They were last seen at The Red Roof Inn in Thomasville Georgia Keilana Butler is believed to be in extreme danger. If you have any information on the whereabouts of Keilana Butler or the 2021 white Nissan Rogue Georgia tax DBM4416, please dial 911. The public can also provide information to the GBI tip line at 1-800-597-TIPS or the See Send app for smartphone users.
